author: songwz
description: Markdown-native daily quick records, flash thoughts, todos, history, filters, and heatmap. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: songwz
manifest.description: Markdown-native daily quick records, flash thoughts, todos, history, filters, and heatmap.
manifest.name: Quick Memo

name: Quick Memo

releases.author: weblogicjava
releases.description:
## v0.2.5

- **Active filter chips:** when filtering by stat card, type, keyword, or tag, the right-pane "筛选结果" row now shows a removable capsule (✕) for each active condition. Removing a chip drops just that condition and the sidebar selection (type-select, search box, tag highlight) syncs automatically; a 清除全部 button appears when two or more conditions are active. Chips remain available even on an empty result set so a filter is never stuck on.
- **Bugfix:** 清除全部 no longer silently no-ops when no keyword filter is set — `onFilterChange`'s no-op skip is now scoped to text-only patches.

Build: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`.

releases.author: weblogicjava
releases.description:
## v0.2.4

- **Todo completion bar (sidebar):** now hidden when every todo is done (or there are no todos); shown only while uncompleted todos remain.
- **Tag pills:** the count is now rendered as a small circular badge instead of loose text — smaller font, pill height unchanged. The selected tag inverts the badge colors for clarity.

Build: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`.

releases.author: weblogicjava
releases.description:
v0.2.3 — lint fixes + English README.

- Removed unnecessary type assertions flagged by the Obsidian submission linter (settings merge, filter callbacks, focus-restore helper).
- Added a full English README (README.en.md) linked from the main README, satisfying the Obsidian plugin directory's English-description requirement.

releases.author: weblogicjava
releases.description:
v0.2.2 — clickable stat cards + todo badge colors.

- **Clickable stat cards**: the 闪念/记录/待办 cards in the sidebar now filter the timeline by type across all dates; click the active card again to clear. Active card is highlighted with an accent tint.
- **Type filter spans all dates**: selecting a type (via the cards or the dropdown) now shows matches across every date, grouped by date — consistent with tag and keyword search.
- **Todo badge colors**: todo record badges are color-coded — green when completed, amber when open.
- Stat card heights unified; active state no longer uses low-contrast white text.
- CLAUDE.md updated to reflect the current architecture.

releases.author: weblogicjava
releases.description:
v0.2.1 — fixes Obsidian plugin submission lint warnings.

- Command names no longer include the plugin name
- onunload returns void; debounced timers no longer return Promise
- Replaced globalThis with window
- Removed unnecessary regex escape in the tag parser
- Use activeDocument / window.setTimeout for popout-window compatibility
- Replaced window.confirm with a Modal-based confirmation dialog
- Removed unnecessary type assertions in the renderer
- Removed CSS !important by raising selector specificity
- Replaced the builtin-modules package with node:module
- Added an English description to the README

releases.author: weblogicjava
releases.description:
v0.2.0 — overview panel enhancements.

- **Stats panel** under the heatmap: card layout (闪念/记录/待办 on top, 使用天数/总记录 below) plus a todo completion ratio bar.
- **Today link**: when browsing a historical date, a 今天 pill appears beside the heatmap heading to jump back to today; fixed-height header prevents layout shift.
- **Composer date**: the selected date is shown next to the type selector so you know which day you're capturing into.
- **Action menu auto-scroll**: the ⋮ menu scrolls into view when it would be clipped by the viewport bottom.
- **Selectable card text**: timeline card bodies can now be selected and copied.
- **Cross-date tag & search**: clicking a tag or searching now spans all dates, with results grouped by date heading.

releases.author: weblogicjava
releases.description:
v0.1.3 — submission fixes.

- Remove plugin name from the settings heading (Obsidian requirement)
- Add MIT LICENSE file so the repository is properly licensed

releases.author: weblogicjava
releases.description:

releases.author: weblogicjava
releases.description:
v0.1.1 — fixes Obsidian submission lint errors.

- Remove detachLeavesOfType from onunload (would reset a user-moved leaf to its default location)
- Reuse existing Quick Memo leaf in activateView instead of force-detaching
- Raise minAppVersion to 1.7.2 (revealLeaf is @since 1.7.2)
- Use Setting().setHeading() instead of an HTML h2 in the settings tab

releases.author: weblogicjava
releases.description:
Quick Memo v0.1.0 — initial release.

Markdown-native daily quick records, flash thoughts (闪念), and todos for Obsidian.

- Records written to yyyy-MM-dd-quick-memos.md (never touches your regular daily notes)
- Type filter, tag filter, keyword search
- 90-day green heatmap
- Todo checkbox syncs back to Markdown
- Edit / delete / copy block link / open source
- Local dates, theme-aware styling
- Lightweight startup: indexes only -quick-memos.md files with debounced vault events
